title: ebenus nigrescens
intro: Ebenus nigrescens, also known as the Black Horseshoe or Black Horseshoe Vetch, is a flowering plant species in the Fabaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems due to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Ebenus nigrescens include alleviating symptoms of coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as soothing digestive issues such as cramps and spasms. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its leaves and flowers in hot water, and sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
